task_completion.description: Open the Chinook database in LibreOffice Base
task_completion.visual_evidence: The LibreOffice Base application window is visible, showing the 'chinook.odb' database.

task_completion.description: Write the SELECT clause with correct columns and aliases
task_completion.visual_evidence: An SQL editor window shows a SELECT statement with exact aliases: "InvoiceYear", "InvoiceMonth", "InvoiceCount", "MonthlyRevenue", and "AverageInvoiceAmount", using HSQLDB date functions like YEAR() and MONTH() or EXTRACT().

task_completion.description: Write the GROUP BY, HAVING, and ORDER BY clauses
task_completion.visual_evidence: The SQL editor shows 'GROUP BY' year and month, 'HAVING' sum of Total > 40 (e.g., HAVING SUM("Total") > 40), and 'ORDER BY' year then month in ascending order.

task_completion.description: Execute the query to verify results
task_completion.visual_evidence: A query result window shows the executed query returning exactly 10 rows with the specified column headers.

task_completion.description: Save the query with the exact name 'MonthlyRevenueAnalysis'
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main LibreOffice Base window shows 'MonthlyRevenueAnalysis' listed under the Queries section, or a save dialog shows this exact name.
The agent clicks the save button in the main LibreOffice Base window, or the save icon is greyed out indicating the database is saved.

integrity.description: Agent used the LibreOffice Base GUI to create the query
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with LibreOffice Base menus, SQL editor, and query design windows, rather than terminal commands executing SQL scripts.

integrity.description: Query results appear to come from genuine execution
integrity.visual_evidence: The query results window shows standard LibreOffice Base formatting and exactly 10 rows, matching the actual database contents.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The Chinook database Invoice table contains 412 rows. When executing the required monthly revenue analysis query (GROUP BY year/month with HAVING SUM(Total) > 40), the actual result is exactly 10 rows. The query must be executed in LibreOffice Base using HSQLDB syntax (e.g., YEAR(), MONTH() or EXTRACT()).
